DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR COMPELLING THAT THE TRUTH OF MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFFS FIRST SET OF REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS. PLAINTIFF IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING THAT THE TRUTH OF MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE RFAS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,410 ARE DUE AND PAYABLE WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDERS TO JPT VIA EMAIL WITH CC TO OPPOSING PARTY/COUNSEL: PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: A. DATT, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO PLAINTIFFS FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES. PLAINTIFF IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE CODE-COMPLIANT VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,410 ARE DUE AND PAYABLE WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Compelling That The Truth Of Matters Specified In Plaintiffs First Set Of Request For Admissions
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order For Compelling That The Truth Of Matters Specified In Plaintiffs First Set Of Request For Admissions.

Plaintiff IDS Property Casualty Insurance Company's unopposed Motion For Order Compelling That The Truth Of Matters Specified In Plaintiff's First Set Of Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Sanctions is Granted. The RFAS are deemed admitted. Sanctions in the amount of $1,410 are due and payable within two weeks of notice of this order.

Prevailing party to submit proposed orders to JPT via email with cc to opposing party/counsel: peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: A. Datt, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Plaintiffs First Set Of Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Plaintiffs First Set Of Form Interrogatories.

Plaintiff IDS Property Casualty Insurance Company's unopposed Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Plaintiff's First Set Of Form Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions is Granted. Defendant shall provide code-compliant verified responses within two weeks of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $1,410 are due and payable within two weeks of notice of this order.

Prevailing party to submit proposed orders to JPT via email with cc to opposing party/counsel: peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: A. Datt, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
